goals.title: Heal rvf/dashboard
goals.objective: Install, build, lint, and smoke-test examples/rvf/dashboard until green; mock fetchStatus() and WebSocket calls for offline dev; verify all 14 view files load without console errors

goals.title: Heal edge-net/dashboard
goals.objective: Install, build, lint, test (Linux only), implement-or-feature-flag the 3 coming-soon stubs; document the upstream #276 (wrtc darwin-arm64) Apple Silicon block prominently

goals.title: Heal scipix/web
goals.objective: Run wasm-pack build .. --target web --out-dir web/pkg --release -- --features wasm to produce missing pkg/; wire npm run dev to build first; verify example.html loads the WASM module without console errors

goals.title: Heal esp32-flash/web-flasher
goals.objective: Verify upstream issue #409 firmware delivery fix landed; parameterize firmware URL via query string or config; add a prominent Chrome/Edge/Opera-only browser warning visible before connect button

goals.title: Heal rvlite/examples/dashboard
goals.objective: Run npm ci; consolidate the 11 markdown design docs into a single coherent README.md that matches actual current code; verify integration with parent rvlite crate's WASM build

goals.title: Heal ruvllm-wasm/webgpu
goals.objective: Add wasm-pack build --target web smoke check to ruvllm-build.yml (or to examples-ui-ci.yml); add a no-WebGPU fallback test that exercises the CPU code path

goals.title: Commit and verify AgentDB reflexion fix
goals.objective: Stage and commit the 32.4K frontier-schema.sql patch + 6 wiring files in examples/agentdb-rag/; run agentdb pattern store/search end-to-end and confirm episodes table now exists; if still broken document gap in docs/agentdb-reflexion-status.md and confirm claude-flow agentdb-pattern-store fallback works

goals.title: Add UI section to root README
goals.objective: Add a 'User Interfaces' section to root README.md listing all 7 UI surfaces (ruvocal + 6 examples) with one-line description and link to their own README; add a link from the top-level Quick Start to ui/ruvocal/README.md as the primary UI

goals.title: Local CI verification
goals.objective: Run all 5 jobs from examples-ui-ci.yml locally (or in a representative environment) and capture green output; if any job is red, fix the root cause not the workflow; record results in docs/ui-ci-verification.md

goals.title: Open PR to FlexNetOS/develop
goals.objective: Push branch feat/examples-ui-ci to origin; open PR via gh pr create --base develop with title 'UI Healing: 6 example dashboards + CI + README + AgentDB fix' and body summarizing all per-surface evidence, the reasoned 5-of-6 CI exclusion, the AgentDB fix outcome, and links to artifacts under .omc/ultragoal/; update auto-memory with anything new learned

claudeObjective: Complete all ultragoal stories in .omc/ultragoal/goals.json: G001-heal-rvf-dashboard Heal rvf/dashboard; G002-heal-edge-net-dashboard Heal edge-net/dashboard; G003-heal-scipix-web Heal scipix/web; G004-heal-esp32-flash-web-flasher Heal esp32-flash/web-flasher; G005-heal-rvlite-examples-dashboard Heal rvlite/examples/dashboard; G006-heal-ruvllm-wasm-webgpu Heal ruvllm-wasm/webgpu; G007-commit-and-verify-agentdb-reflexion Commit and verify AgentDB reflexion fix; G008-add-ui-section-to-root-readme Add UI section to root README; G009-local-ci-verification Local CI verification; G010-open-pr-to-flexnetos-develop Open PR to FlexNetOS/develop
